news.summary: RainFocus™, a leading provider of the next-generation event marketing platform, has achieved prestigious recognition for the second year in a row by securing a spot in the Leaders Quadrant. The company, based in LEHI, Utah, was acknowledged for its exceptional Completeness of Vision and Ability to Execute. The achievement was announced on June 13, 2025, marking a significant milestone for the company. This recognition underscores RainFocus™’ commitment to innovation and excellence in the industry, solidifying its position as a key player in the market.
news.headline: RainFocus recognized as a Leader in 2025 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Event Marketing & Management Platforms based on 2 consecutive years of achieving high scores in Vision and Execution. #RainFocusLeader2025

news.summary: During a market capitulation in the crypto industry, there is a significant surge in selling activity as investors feel panicked, leading to a sharp decline in asset prices. This phase often indicates the lowest point in a market cycle, with traders rushing to sell off assets in response to market conditions. It is characterized by intense fear and uncertainty among investors, resulting in a rapid drop in cryptocurrency prices. It serves as a crucial indicator for market analysts and traders to assess the current state of the market.
news.headline: Crypto capitulation: Extreme selling pressure as investors panic, selling off assets; signals potential market bottom. #cryptocurrency

news.summary: In Abbott Park, Illinois, on June 13, 2025, the board of directors of Abbott (NYSE: ABT) announced a quarterly common dividend of 59 cents per share. This marks the 406th consecutive quarterly dividend paid by Abbott since 1924. Shareholders can expect to receive the cash dividend on August 15, 2025.
news.headline: Abbott announces 406th consecutive quarterly dividend of 59 cents per share since 1924, payable on Aug. 15, 2025.

news.summary: On June 13, 2025, Invesco Commercial Real Estate Finance Trust, Inc. (known as INCREF), a real estate investment trust specializing in private credit backed by real estate, announced it has extended financing of $354.6 million to Bridge Logistics Properties (BLP). INCREF, operating as a perpetual life REIT, continues its strategic focus on supporting real estate ventures through significant financial investments like this recent deal with BLP.
news.headline: In June 2025, INCREF gave $354.6M to BLP for industrial portfolio refinance.

news.summary: Analysts are closely monitoring oil prices amidst rising tensions in the Middle East. The potential impact on Bitcoin remains uncertain, as traders speculate on whether the cryptocurrency will be affected. Despite this uncertainty, there is optimism among traders about a possible price recovery for Bitcoin. The situation has sparked conversations in the macroeconomic analysis community, with oil prices being a key focus. This comes as tensions in the Middle East continue to escalate, with significant implications for global markets. The debate around the potential impact on Bitcoin adds another layer of complexity to the ongoing discussions.
news.headline: Bitcoin remains steady at $105,000 amidst conflicting views on oil price trends. Traders speculate if BTC will be affected.

news.summary: Hisense, a prominent brand in global consumer electronics and home appliances, is introducing its "Own the Moment" Tour across the country. The immersive soccer experience offers big screens, big games, and big prizes from the pitch to the parking lot. Taking place in Miami on June 13, 2025, this tour aims to engage soccer fans with exciting opportunities. Hisense's initiative provides an interactive platform for enthusiasts, with significant focus on engaging audiences in the thrilling world of soccer. This nationwide tour seeks to connect with a wide audience by offering unique and rewarding experiences. Attendees can anticipate an array of engaging activities and chances to win impressive prizes during the event. Football lovers and technology enthusiasts alike are encouraged to attend and be a part of this immersive soccer experience.
news.headline: Hisense brings immersive soccer experience to Miami with big screens, games, prizes. "Own the Moment" Tour. #HisenseMiamiTour

news.summary: The Hyundai IONIQ 9, equipped with standard NACS port and terrain modes for optimal adventure performance, was selected as the top choice by approximately 80 automotive media professionals at MAMA's Spring Rally. The accolade was received in Chicago on June 13, 2025. This electric vehicle was recognized as the Favorite Plug-in EV in the Midwest Automotive Media event.
news.headline: Hyundai IONIQ 9 named favorite plug-in EV by Midwest Automotive Media Association, picked by 80 media at Spring Rally.

news.summary: Crypto market faced a downturn as Israel attacked Iran, causing $1.1 billion in liquidations and Wynn being liquidated again. GameStop increased its debt raise to $2.25 billion to invest in BTC, with 21 companies launching BTC reserve in the past month. Sharplink saw a 70% decrease after announcing an equity re-sale, acquiring $463 million worth of ETH. DFDV revealed a $5 billion equity line to buy SOL, while Tony G launched a HYPE treasury with $400k HYPE. DOT community suggested a BTC treasury, Phantom enabled USDC payments on Shopify, and Walmart & Amazon pondered issuing stablecoins. Trident Digital aims to raise $500 million to purchase XRP, while the DTCC explores stablecoin use. Coinbase collaborated with AmEx on a BTC cashback card and will permit DEX & perp trading in the US. The SEC delayed decisions on multiple altcoin ETFs, while Tether acquired 32% of Elemental Altus for $92 million. Tokenised gold debuted on Hyperliquid. Live every weekday from 10:00 AM to 11:00 AM EST, FOMO HOUR covers vital updates across the crypto and macro worlds, streaming on YouTube and X.
news.headline: Crypto prices drop, Israel hits Iran; Gold, Oil surge. $1.1bn liquidations, GameStop aims for $2.25bn, 21 firms back BTC. Sharplink faces 70% drop, acquires $463m ETH. DFDV sets $5bn equity to buy SOL. DOT mulls BTC treasury. Phantom allows USDC payments to Shopify. Walmart, Amazon eye stablecoins. Trident Digital seeks $500m for XRP buy. DTCC explores stablecoins. news.summary: H55, a leading electric aviation company, recently finished the fourth leg of its Across America tour in Las Vegas. The company, based in Sion, Switzerland, and Palo Alto, California, is known for its innovative battery systems designed for real-world resilience. H55 is a technological spin-off of the renowned Solar Impulse project. The tour is aimed at showcasing H55's cutting-edge electric aviation technology, with this recent stop in Las Vegas marking a significant milestone.
news.headline: H55's battery systems excel in hot climates, delivers unmatched performance, stops in Las Vegas on Across America tour.

news.summary: On June 13, 2025, a recent report from The Insight Partners revealed that the worldwide welded steel tubes market is experiencing strong growth, driven by increasing demand in the construction and automotive industries. The market is predicted to continue expanding, with key factors such as rising infrastructure projects and automotive production contributing to its growth. The report provides a detailed analysis of the market trends, with global revenue projections and growth rates outlined. This surge in demand for welded steel tubes is expected to lead to significant opportunities for manufacturers and suppliers operating in the industry.
news.headline: Global welded steel tubes market expected to reach US$274.25 billion by 2031 with a CAGR of 5.6%. High demand in construction and automotive sectors driving growth.

news.summary: The "Building-Integrated Photovoltaics (BIPV): Technologies and Global Markets" study by BCC Research predicts a significant growth in the BIPV market, rising from $17.1 billion in 2024 to $42.0 billion by the end of 2029, with a CAGR of 19.7% during this period. The report delves into market trends, segmented by technology, application, end user, and region, focusing on BIPV projects in new constructions and renovations. Major factors driving growth include the rising demand for solar energy, emphasis on reducing carbon footprints, and increasing global energy demands. BIPV technologies are seen as sustainable solutions to meet the escalating energy needs, supported by government incentives for renewable energy. The report also touches on trends, challenges, ESG developments, patents, and emerging technologies within the BIPV sector while profiling key market players and analyzing the competitive landscape. The comprehensive analysis underscores the importance of BIPV adoption in the building sector to address environmental concerns and increase energy efficiency.
news.headline: Global Building-Integrated Photovoltaics (BIPV) market to reach $42.0 billion by 2029, with a CAGR of 19.7% from 2024.

news.summary: A company based in Portland, Oregon called Skypoint revealed on June 13, 2025 the introduction of two new AI agents, Skypoint Lia and Skypoint Scribe. These AI agents are part of their HITRUST r2-certified platform for healthcare and aim to enhance workflow efficiency. Skypoint's innovative technology is set to make a significant impact in the healthcare industry, catering to the need for seamless and accurate processes. The launch of these advanced AI agents signifies a step further in merging technology and healthcare, promising better services and outcomes for both medical professionals and patients.
news.headline: Skypoint introduces two AI agents, Lia and Scribe, to enhance healthcare workflow efficiency and SDOH data capture.

news.summary: The latest report indicates a significant increase in the number of COVID-19 cases in the country, with a total of 10,000 new confirmed cases recorded in the past week. This surge brings the total number of cases to 50,000, marking a 25% increase compared to the previous month. Authorities have expressed concerns over the rising numbers and are urging the public to adhere to safety guidelines, including wearing masks and practicing social distancing. Additionally, there has been a notable rise in hospitalizations, with 500 new admissions reported in the last 72 hours. The government is considering implementing stricter measures to curb the spread of the virus and protect public health.
news.headline: Starmer agrees to 3.5% NATO target. #news #Starmer #NATO.
